revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[be:Фукуяма]][[ceb:Fukuyama]][[de:Fukuyama (Begriffsklärung)]][[en:Fukuyama]][[es:Fukuyama]][[fa:فوکویاما]][[fi:Fukuyama (täsmennyssivu)]][[fr:Fukuyama (homonymie)]][[he:פוקויאמה]][[id:Fukuyama]][[it:Fukuyama (disambigua)]][[ko:후쿠야마]][[lv:Fukujama]][[mg:Fukuyama]][[nl:Fukuyama]][[pt:Fukuyama]][[ru:Фукуяма]][[sv:Fukuyama]][[uk:Фукуяма (значення)]] '''Fukuyama''' may refer to:
==People== * {{ill|Francis Fukuyama|en|Francis Fukuyama|qid=Q186123|lt=Francis Fukuyama|1=Francis Fukuyama}}, Japanese-American philosopher and political economist * {{ill|Fukuyama (surname)|en|Fukuyama (surname)|qid=Q16870050|lt=Fukuyama (surname)|1=Fukuyama (surname)}}, other people with the name
==Places== *{{ill|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|en|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|qid=Q661038|lt=Fukuyama, Hiroshima|1=Fukuyama, Hiroshima}}, city in Japan *{{ill|Fukuyama, Kagoshima|en|Fukuyama, Kagoshima|qid=Q5507753|lt=Fukuyama, Kagoshima|1=Fukuyama, Kagoshima}}, former town in Japan, now part of Kirishima city
==Other uses== *Fukuyama congenital muscular dystrophy ([[:en:FCMD|FCMD]])
{{disambiguation|geo}}
[[en:Fukuyama]]
<!--Fukuyama--><!--Fukuyama--> <!--enwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[be:Фукуяма]] [[ceb:Fukuyama]] [[de:Fukuyama (Begriffsklärung)]] [[es:Fukuyama]] [[fa:فوکویاما]] [[fi:Fukuyama (täsmennyssivu)]] [[fr:Fukuyama (homonymie)]] [[he:פוקויאמה]] [[id:Fukuyama]] [[it:Fukuyama (disambigua)]] [[ko:후쿠야마]] [[lv:Fukujama]] [[mg:Fukuyama]] [[nl:Fukuyama]] [[pt:Fukuyama]] [[ru:Фукуяма]] [[sv:Fukuyama]] [[uk:Фукуяма (значення)]] <!--dewiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q298595}} {{disambiguation}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
